notes: client.ts modification authorized via shared_files.owner = #FEAT-046 in EXECUTION_PLAN.json. All 6 acceptance criteria met: (1) tasks GET route now accepts optional step_id — omitting it returns all workspace tasks; (2) fetchAllTasks(workspaceId) added to client.ts; (3) TaskCountsContext created in canvas.ts as Map<string, { completed: number; total: number }>; (4) canvas-view.tsx fetches all workspace tasks on mount, builds the map, wraps ReactFlow in TaskCountsContext.Provider (outer) + CommentCountsContext.Provider (inner); (5) step-node.tsx consumes TaskCountsContext and displays completed/total badge bottom-left with ListTodo icon (avoids overlap with comment badge at bottom-right); (6) section-detail-panel.tsx consumes TaskCountsContext and shows task rollup with per-step progress rows plus section-level summary total.
